title: A dining experience that combines royalty with taste.
subtitle: From our signature dosas and thalis to great coffee and kofta specials — every visit is an experience worth repeating.

items.title: 100% Pure Vegetarian
items.description: Vegetarian options only — South Indian, North Indian, Chinese, kofta specials, soups, beverages, and desserts all under one roof.

items.title: Great Coffee & Dessert
items.description: Known for our filter coffee, masala tea, badam milk, and great desserts — the perfect companions to any meal.

items.title: Highway Convenience
items.description: Located on NH-75, a gem for highway travellers with ample parking, drive-through, and quick service.

items.title: All Group Sizes Welcome
items.description: Good for solo dining, families, groups, tourists, and business associates. Party hall and catering available.
